brief_title: Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of MT-601 in Patients With Relapsed/Refractory Lymphoma
official_title: A Phase 1 Study of Patient-Derived Multi-Tumor-Associated Antigen-Specific T Cells (MT-601) Administered to Patients With Relapsed or Refractory Non-Hodgkin and Hodgkin Lymphoma (APOLLO)
